lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't you think this is all a bit cruel?

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Keeping so many monkeys locked up in that crowded pen. I bet they dream of being back in the jungle...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't you ever dream?

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: I ... er ... used to dream to be a Monkey Minder when I was young boy...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And look at you now ... all grown up having achieved your dreams! Would you deny me my dreams? Would you deny a monkey its dreams?

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: Er, look, stop wasting my time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I -

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: Leave me alone now. Some of us have work to do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've just thought of a way to solve your little monkey problem...

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: Oh, what's that then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, you have too many monkeys, don't you?

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: Yes...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, you could give away your monkeys to people who would look after them. You could even start with me!

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: I'm sorry, I don't think I'm allowed to do that. I've just been ordered to not let any monkeys escape.

sections.title: If the player has not talked to a monkey minder before

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: Hello, sir.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't seen Monkey Minders here before...

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: Yes, you wouldn't have. We have newly been posted here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But why do we need Monkey Minders?

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: It's entirely necessary: just take a look at the monkeys. They've been multiplying out of control!

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: Every time we turn our backs another one of them tries to break free. It's almost as if they're plotting to escape!

sections.title: If the player has talked with a monkey minder before

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why have the monkeys been multiplying?

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: We just don't know. Perhaps it's the weather. Perhaps it's something in the food. Perhaps it's just that time of year.

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: Your guess is as good as ours.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you going to do about the monkeys?

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: We're going to post enough men here to be able to contain the monkeys in case they manage to escape.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that very likely?

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: Stranger things have happened in Ardougne.

sections.title: Talking to a monkey minder with a Karamjan monkey greegree equipped

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: Why do you monkeys keep trying to escape? Good thing I've caught you before you got away, you little scoundrel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ook!

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: Let's put you back in your cage where you belong...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok!

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: What??

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err ... Ook?

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: I must be imagining things ... monkeys can't talk.

sections.title: Talking to a monkey minder with any other greegree equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ook Ook!

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: I don't know what kind of monkey you think you are, but you're not getting anywhere near my monkeys!

sections.title: Talking to a monkey minder while inside the monkey cage with any greegree equipped

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: Stop hassling me!

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: Be quiet, you monkey!

sections.title: Talking to a monkey minder while inside the monkey cage without any greegree equipped

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: My word - what are you doing in there?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I ... er ... I don't know! One minute I was asleep, and the next minute I was here surrounded by monkeys!

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: Well, don't worry. We'll have you out of there shortly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Monkey minder
lines.text: No problem.
